reviews.comment:
Lo mas caro del mundo. Como les permiten poner esos precios siendo un lugar necesario como parada. El agua para el termo 50 la ficha y cargue apretando el boton 1 min  menos de 1l

(Translated by Google)
The most expensive place in the world. How can they charge such prices when it's such a necessary stop? Water for the water heater costs 50, and you have to press the button for 1 minute to fill it with less than 1 liter.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlcjlmTEhnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Both the gas station and the shop were disastrous; the worst I experienced on the road.

reviews.comment:
Si bien es entendible por que va mucha gente,  la atención es muy lerda por que cuentan con un solo surtidor. Tiene otros de gasoil pero no lo usan y eso hace q las esperas sean largas

(Translated by Google)
While it's understandable why so many people come, service is very slow because they only have one pump. There are other diesel pumps, but they don't use them, which makes for long waits.
